title: E38: Self-hosting metric: measure the share of each release authored by Formal AI
author: konard
body: Parent: #651. E38 asks for authorship attribution from recorded E36/E37 Formal AI session evidence, changed-line measurement between release tags, scripts/self-hosting-metric.rs, GitHub release-body publication, a .lino trend ledger, an honest 0% start, and a monotonic non-decreasing trailing-window ratchet.
